name_en: Goyard Bulldog, the Villette tote has a large capacity. It can be carried by hand or over the shoulder, suitable for both men and women. It is double-sided: the Hulot pattern side is casual and relaxed, while the Goyardine canvas side (without the Hulot pattern) is understated and elegant.
name_cn:
Goyard Bulldog, the Villette tote has a large capacity. It can be carried by hand or over the shoulder, suitable for both men and women. It is double-sided: the Hulot pattern side is casual and relaxed, while the Goyardine canvas side (without the Hulot pattern) is understated and elegant.
32 cm x 15 cm x 45 cm
🔎020197-Red
